mapper.select: WITH LATEST_STORY AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (S."USER_NO") S."FEED_NO", S."FEED_DATE", S."USER_NO", S."FEED_THUMB" FROM "STORY" S ORDER BY S."USER_NO", S."FEED_DATE" DESC, S."FEED_NO" DESC ) SELECT LS.*, SI."FILE_NO", SI."FILE_NAME", SI."ORI_NAME", U."USER_NICKNAME", UIP."FILE_NO" AS "PROFILE_FILE_NO", UIP."FILE_NAME" AS "PROFILE_FILE_NAME", UIP."ORI_NAME" AS "PROFILE_ORI_NAME" FROM LATEST_STORY LS LEFT JOIN "STORY_IMG" SI ON LS."FEED_NO" = SI."FEED_NO" LEFT JOIN "USER" U ON LS."USER_NO" = U."USER_NO" LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT UI."FILE_NO", UI."FILE_NAME", UI."ORI_NAME" FROM "USER_IMG" UI WHERE UI."USER_NO" = LS."USER_NO" ORDER BY UI."FILE_NO" DESC LIMIT 1 ) UIP ON TRUE ORDER BY LS."FEED_DATE" DESC LIMIT #{perPage} OFFSET #{startNum}

SELECT S.*, U."USER_NO", U."USER_NICKNAME", R."ROLE_NAME", SI."FILE_NO", SI."FILE_NAME", SI."ORI_NAME" FROM "STORY" S LEFT JOIN "STORY_IMG" SI ON S."FEED_NO" = SI."FEED_NO" LEFT JOIN "USER" U ON S."USER_NO" = U."USER_NO" LEFT JOIN "USER_ROLE" UR ON U."USER_NO" = UR."USER_NO" LEFT JOIN "ROLE" R ON UR."ROLE_NO" = R."ROLE_NO" WHERE S."FEED_NO" = #{feedNo}

SELECT S.*, U."USER_NICKNAME", SI."FILE_NO", SI."FILE_NAME", SI."ORI_NAME" FROM "STORY" S LEFT JOIN "STORY_IMG" SI ON S."FEED_NO" = SI."FEED_NO" LEFT JOIN "USER" U ON S."USER_NO" = U."USER_NO" WHERE S."USER_NO" = #{userNo} ORDER BY S."FEED_DATE" DESC, S."FEED_NO" DESC, SI."FILE_NO" ASC
